title: Italian Cherry Cannoli
description: A sweet Italian dessert featuring cherry filling and crispy cannoli shells.
instructions: Chill the cannoli shells in the refrigerator for 30 minutes.
In a medium bowl, whip the whipped cream until stiff peaks form.
Fold the whipped cream into the cherry filling until well combined.
Spoon the cherry filling into the chilled cannoli shells.
Sprinkle the chopped pistachios and powdered sugar over the filling.
Drizzle the vanilla extract over the top of the cannoli.
